body_html:
-----Forwarded Message-----

From: Marcos mzucaratto@artefactousa.com
Sent: Dec 28, 2007 12:22 PM
To: jenniferturner@mindspring.com
Subject: horizontal wood blinds

Dear Jennifer,

Please find attached invoice for the horizontal blinds.

The invoice does not include sales tax because I quote as a company's
purchase, so you will have to include sales tax to the total.

Also my designer discount was not included; please subtract 20% of the grand
total.

Break down :

$ 15,283.00 total

$ 3,056.60 20% designer disc.

$ 12,226.40 new subtotal

$ 855.85 7% sales tax

$ 13,082.25 grand total

50% of the grand total is required upon approval.

Thank you

Marcos Zucaratto

Design Consultant

4440 Ponce de Leon Blvd

Coral Gables - FL - 33146

ph # 305 774-0004 & fax # 305 476-3994

mzucaratto@artefactousa.com
